articles.title: Fundraiser launched for Reddit tipster who helped identify suspect in Brown shooting
articles.description:
Organizers say the anonymous tipster who helped investigators track the suspect is currently without permanent housing.

The post Fundraiser launched for Reddit tipster who helped identify suspect in Brown shooting appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Organizers launched a fundraiser for the anonymous Reddit tipster aiding in the Brown shooting case.
The tipster is currently without permanent housing, highlighting local homelessness issues.
Funds raised aim to support the tipster's immediate needs and promote community safety.

articles.title: Joe Mazzulla praises Baylor Scheierman’s work ethic
articles.description:
"He doesn’t care about anything except competing, and that doesn’t get rewarded enough."

The post Joe Mazzulla praises Baylor Scheierman’s work ethic appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Joe Mazzulla commends Baylor Scheierman's dedication to competition in recent statements.
Mazzulla highlights Scheierman's work ethic as crucial for team success this season.
Local fans can expect increased performance from the Celtics due to Scheierman's influence.

articles.title: Alexander brothers are convicted of sex trafficking in case that shocked the real estate world
articles.description:
The verdict came after 11 women testified in Manhattan federal court they were sexually assaulted by one or more of the brothers: twins Oren and Alon Alexander, 38, and Tal Alexander, 39.

The post Alexander brothers are convicted of sex trafficking in case that shocked the real estate world appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Oren, Alon, and Tal Alexander convicted of sex trafficking in Manhattan federal court.
Eleven women testified against the brothers, revealing extensive sexual assault allegations.
The case raises concerns about safety and accountability in Boston's real estate sector.

articles.title: Police are searching for North Shore suspect in string of indecent assaults
articles.description:
Investigators say there were three separate incidents where the suspect inappropriately touched female victims from behind before fleeing.

The post Police are searching for North Shore suspect in string of indecent assaults appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Police investigate three indecent assaults involving a North Shore suspect targeting women.
Victims reported being inappropriately touched from behind before the suspect fled.
Residents urged to remain vigilant and report any suspicious activity to authorities.

articles.title: Wu announces millions in new funding for immigrant services
articles.description:
Three major philanthropic organizations are committing to a public-private partnership that will help immigrants get legal services, basic necessities, and more.

The post Wu announces millions in new funding for immigrant services appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Mayor Wu announces millions in funding for immigrant services in Boston.
Three philanthropic organizations join a public-private partnership to support immigrants.
Funding will provide legal services and basic necessities for Boston's immigrant community.
